span.p: Single discriminated-union output (P1.1)\nreplaces per-event @Output proliferation.\nHosts switch on event.type.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: key = FormGroup control name +\nAPI field name (must match backend).

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Built once at component construction\n— constant-time per-field lookup\nfrom RFC-7807 errors[key].

svg.text: DPH UI Kit — Forms · Schema · Validators · Events
